data.name: Soulgasm
data.detailed_description:
😽 WISHLIST PLEASE 😽 & 😈 Join the Horde 😈


關於此遊戲

Features:

💋 Art, animation, characters - all handmade without AI

💋 Smexy Voice Over of real girls (also no AI)

💋 Unmatched art by CptPopcorn

💋 Lewd interactions

💋 We are downright proud of what we are doing'🎨

💋 Immersive interactive sex animations.

💋 Anti-grinding super duper ethics.

💋 Characters hard not to fall in love with

💋 6 unique charming ladies to... lewd dep and hard

💋 A game about choices.

You didn't plan on staying... But here you are.

On the run and out of options, you find yourself on an island that isn't on any map you've seen, home to a grand, peculiar estate and the even more peculiar women who inhabit it. Your host has made it clear: you leave when she says you can leave. Until then, you might as well make yourself useful.

Soulgasm is an adult visual novel, built around deep character relationships, player-driven choices, and a story that keeps revealing there's far more going on beneath the surface of this island than anyone is letting on.

Learn Eromancy, explore the Palace, build relationships, solve the riddles, and find out what the hell is up with this House.

Play Soulgasm! - an Erotic Fantasy Adventure Dating Game! It is more than a visual novel, where the romance part is highly interactive, and your decisions matter. A pie of comedy and drama with a fresh bit of mystery on top in the very special fantasy world we have brewed for you!

data.short_description: Soulgasm is an erotic visual novel where survival depends on relationships. You're a stranger who washed ashore on a hidden island, five women between you and whatever comes next. Shape your story, make your choices, and uncover the secrets that made this place so hard to find.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8 or 10
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Intel Core i3 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 960 with at least 2GB of VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8 or 10
  • 處理器: 3.2 GHz Intel Core i5 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 1060 with at least 4GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
